personal.name: Mujeeb P
personal.bio: Versatile IT and Web Development student with a powerful blend of technical hardware skills, front-end development, and professional multimedia editing expertise. Experienced in managing computer lab operations, deploying live web platforms, and utilizing the Adobe Creative Cloud suite for digital asset creation.

paragraphs: I am an IT and Web Development student with a strong passion for blending code, hardware, and creative design. My journey spans from managing computer lab operations to deploying responsive web platforms.

Beyond code, I have professional multimedia editing expertise using the complete Adobe Creative Cloud suite. Whether it's diagnosing NVMe SSDs and Linux VMs, or creating motion graphics and web-ready visual assets, I love bridging the gap between deep technical infrastructure and polished creative output.

projects.title: ITQAN Friends Website
projects.description: Developed the user interface using clean semantic HTML/CSS and exported web-ready visual assets using Adobe tools to enhance site aesthetics.

projects.title: Professional Portfolio
projects.description: Designed and built a personalized digital portfolio to showcase technical capabilities and creative editing projects. Optimized frontend assets for quick loading.

projects.title: Hardware Lab Management
projects.description: Managed daily operations and hardware readiness. Diagnosed and resolved faults, recovering unreadable 3.5-inch 1TB external storage drives.

projects.title: Multimedia Production
projects.description: Experimenting with advanced video editing techniques, audio timing, color grading, and graphic trends to create polished digital solutions.

experience.description: Manage daily operations, hardware readiness, and software environments across lab workstations. Perform hardware diagnostics, NVMe SSD upgrades, and resolve complex OS anomalies.
Developed and structured the user interface using semantic HTML and responsive CSS. Designed and optimized web-ready visual assets using Adobe tools.
Designing personalized digital portfolios and experimenting with advanced video editing techniques, audio timing, and color grading.

achievements.title: IT & Web Dev Student
achievements.description: Information Technology / Computer Science track resident in Kannur, Kerala.

achievements.title: Hardware Troubleshooting
achievements.description: Successfully recovered unreadable 1TB storage drives and performed high-speed NVMe upgrades.

achievements.title: Multimedia Editor
